title: Intense Bitter Turkish Mackerel Iskender
description: A bold, crumbly Turkish brunch dish featuring smoked mackerel, kombu extract, and creamy yogurt in a Dutch oven.
instructions: Preheat Dutch oven over medium heat and add olive oil.
Toast the torn crusty roll cubes until golden, about 3 minutes, then set aside.
In the same Dutch oven, sauté the diced shallot until translucent, about 2 minutes.
Stir in the sun dried tomato puree and smoked paprika, cooking for 1 minute to bloom the spices.
Add the smoked mackerel and kombu extract, breaking the fish into flakes, and cook until the fish is heated through, about 4 minutes.
Reduce heat to low, pour in the Greek yogurt, stir gently, and let the sauce thicken for 2 minutes.
Gently fold in the toasted roll cubes, seasoning with salt, pepper, and sumac, and warm through for another minute.
While the mixture simmers, melt butter in a small pan and drizzle it over the top before serving.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
